articles.title: LESSONS FROM LINEAR'S COO
articles.summary: Cristina Cordova has been in the trenches of some of the MOST ADMIRED STARTUPS: she was on the early GTM team at STRIPE, built growth at NOTION, and now helps lead LINEAR ($1.25B valuation) as COO.

articles.title: REFLECTION RAISES $2B TO BE AMERICA'S OPEN FRONTIER AI LAB, CHALLENGING DEEPSEEK
articles.summary: Reflection raised $2 billion at an $8 billion valuation to challenge established AI labs by developing open-source frontier models. Founded by ex-Google DeepMind researchers, the startup aims to release a high-powered language model next year. The company will share model weights publicly while capitalizing on enterprise and government clients for revenue.

articles.title: FIGMA PARTNERS WITH GOOGLE TO ADD GEMINI AI TO ITS DESIGN PLATFORM
articles.summary: Figma has partnered with Google to integrate Gemini AI models into its design platform, enhancing image editing and generation. Gemini 2.5 Flash promises a 50% reduction in latency for Figma's "Make Image" feature, improving workflows for 13 million users. Google also introduced Gemini Enterprise to enhance AI capabilities for enterprise clients, expanding its suite of integrations and partnerships.

articles.title: EVEN AFTER STARGATE, ORACLE, NVIDIA, AND AMD, OPENAI HAS MORE BIG DEALS COMING SOON, SAM ALTMAN SAYS
articles.summary: OpenAI is involved in major deals with AMD and Nvidia, acquiring significant stakes in these companies, while planning to develop next-gen AI GPUs and data centers. CEO Sam Altman indicates more partnerships are imminent as OpenAI aims to ramp up infrastructure to meet future demand. Despite current revenue not matching extensive investment, Altman remains confident that these strategic moves will drive future economic returns.

articles.title: WE REBUILT OUR ONBOARDING AROUND MCP
articles.summary: Most developer onboarding flows lose users before they ever see real value. DevCycle found the problem wasn't motivation, it was location. Developers don't want to leave their editors to try a demo app. So the team rebuilt onboarding around the Model-Context-Protocol (MCP), letting AI coding assistants like Cursor or VS Code install and configure the SDK directly in-editor. Two prompts now replace an entire tutorial, tripling install rates and shrinking time-to-value from hours to minutes.

articles.title: HOW TO BUILD (AND EXPLAIN) COHORT CHARTS
articles.summary: Most founders can quote retention rates, but few can show them. This guide breaks down the three cohort charts every operator should know - range retention tables, spider charts, and stacked area charts - and explains when to use each. You'll learn how to build them, interpret the patterns, and turn a pile of numbers into a story about what's really happening in your customer base.

articles.title: GEN AI PRESENT AND FUTURE: A CONVERSATION WITH NAVEEN ZUTSHI, CIO AT DATABRICKS
articles.summary: GenAI is transforming enterprise software by enhancing development and intelligence systems, though challenges remain in areas like sales and reliability. Databricks' CIO highlights improvements in AI-driven tasks, such as automating manual processes and improving data handling without needing additional staff. Startups benefit from GenAI by focusing on automation, allowing them to scale rapidly and efficiently.

articles.title: BEST PRACTICES FOR SELLING AI CREDITS, AND WHAT COMES NEXT
articles.summary: Most teams launch AI pricing fast, with credits. But credits are a bridge, not a strategy. See why they work, where they break, and how to move beyond them. Read the full breakdown on the Metronome blog [11].

articles.title: FIRESIDE
articles.summary: Ask for help on your toughest problems.

articles.title: LEADBAY
articles.summary: Discover and qualify SMB leads that others can't find.

articles.title: COMPUTERX
articles.summary: AI agent that automates routine computer tasks to boost productivity.

articles.title: FROM AGENT HYPE TO AGENT FATIGUE
articles.summary: Everyone said 2025 would be the year of AI agents, and they were right, just not in the way they expected. Companies raced to rebrand every workflow as “agentic,” but the reality is showing cracks: 40% of projects are predicted to fail by 2027, and employees are burning out under the pressure to use tools they barely understand.

articles.title: THE COFOUNDER RELATIONSHIP: YOUR STARTUP'S MOST IMPORTANT ASSET
articles.summary: Founders obsess over product-market fit but overlook the partnership that holds everything together. This piece argues that most startups fail not from poor execution, but from unspoken tension between cofounders. It breaks down the psychology of trust, emotional debt, and communication styles that quietly shape every decision.

articles.title: DATACURVE RAISES $15 MILLION TO TAKE ON SCALE AI
JEFF BEZOS: THE FOUNDER'S JOB IS TO BUILD A “HEAVY” COMPANY
articles.summary: When Amazon's stock fell from $113 to $6, Jeff Bezos didn't try to fix the price — he focused on the business.

articles.title: THE CEO COMPLEXES
articles.summary: Every founder builds differently, but most eventually fall into one of three traps.

articles.title: OPENAI'S SORA HAS ALREADY HIT MORE THAN 1 MILLION DOWNLOADS
articles.summary: OpenAI's Sora, an invite-only AI video-generating app, reached over 1 million downloads in under five days, surpassing ChatGPT's initial growth rate.
